prompt: A photorealistic portrait of a smiling older Caucasian couple sitting at a rustic wooden table inside a {argument name="setting" default="cozy traditional pub"}. The man on the left has white hair and a full white beard, wearing a {argument name="man's clothing" default="green fleece jacket"} over a maroon shirt. The woman on the right has short grey hair and glasses, wearing a {argument name="woman's clothing" default="blue denim jacket and cream scarf"}. They are looking directly at the camera, each holding one of the 2 {argument name="beverage" default="glasses of beer"}. On the table in the foreground, there is 1 small lit brass lantern and 1 {argument name="table snacks" default="bowl of potato chips"}. The background features warm lighting, wooden paneled walls with framed pictures, windows on the left, and blurred patrons, creating a shallow depth of field.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的肖像，一对面带微笑的老年夫妇正坐在 {argument name="setting" default="温馨传统酒馆"} 内一张质朴的木桌旁。左侧的男士留着白发和浓密的白胡子，身穿一件 {argument name="man's clothing" default="橄榄绿抓绒夹克"}。右侧的女士留着灰色短发并戴着眼镜，身穿 {argument name="woman's clothing" default="蓝色牛仔夹克和白色围巾"}。他们都直视镜头，每人手中各拿着一杯 {argument name="beverage" default="品脱啤酒"}。桌子前方放着一 {argument name="table snack" default="碗薯片"} 和一盏点亮的小型复古灯笼。背景呈现出温暖诱人的灯光，采用浅景深效果，虚化了木镶板墙壁、挂框照片以及其他几位顾客。

breakdown.creativeCore: 温馨酒馆里的老年夫妇：生成一张写实风格的肖像，展现一对老年夫妇在传统酒馆里享用饮品和小吃的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
